heading: Designation or award to be on competitive basis
label: 40310 Designation or award to be on competitive basis
text: The Administrator shall not under this chapter designate any space grant college or space grant regional consortium or award any fellowship, grant, or contract unless such designation or award is made in accordance with the competitive, merit-based review process employed by the Administration on .October 30, 1987
notes: Historical and Revision NotesRevisedSectionSource (U.S. Code)Source (Statutes at Large)40310.42 U.S.C. 2486k, , .Pub. L. 100–147, title II, § 213101 Stat. 875Oct. 30, 1987The date “” is substituted for “the date of enactment of this Act” to reflect the date of enactment of the National Space Grant College and Fellowship Act, which is title II of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration Authorization Act of 1988 (, ).October 30, 1987Public Law 100–147101 Stat. 860
